subcodes.first_line: O seeker after the subtle mysteries divine! The greatest luminary of this world is the center of elemental lights and the source of training and growth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طالب دقائق اسرار الهی نیر اعظم این جهان مرکز انوار عنصریست و تربیت و نشو و
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @divine emanation is ceaseless; eternal, @Manifestation of God as sun
